Social Security Optimization

Maximize your lifetime Social Security benefits with strategic claiming strategies.

The Claiming Decision Is Permanent

When you claim Social Security can mean a difference of hundreds of thousands of dollars over your lifetime.

Age 62
Earliest Claiming Age

Reduced Benefits

Claiming at 62 permanently reduces your benefit by up to 30% compared to your full retirement age.

Age 67
Full Retirement Age

Full Benefits

Receive 100% of your calculated benefit at your full retirement age (66-67 for most current retirees).

Age 70
Maximum Benefit

Enhanced Benefits

Delayed retirement credits increase your benefit by 8% per year up to age 70 — a guaranteed return.

Our Social Security Analysis

What We Analyze

  • Your earnings history and projected benefits
  • Spousal benefit strategies
  • Divorced spouse benefit eligibility
  • Survivor benefit planning
  • Coordination with pension income
  • Impact on Medicare IRMAA premiums
  • Tax implications of different claiming ages

Strategies We Consider

  • Delayed claiming for maximum benefit
  • File and suspend strategies
  • Restricted application options
  • Bridge income during delay period
  • Coordination with other income sources
  • Break-even analysis for different scenarios
  • Inflation-adjusted lifetime projections

Spousal & Survivor Benefits

Married couples have additional claiming strategies that can significantly increase lifetime benefits.

Spousal Benefits

A spouse can receive up to 50% of the higher earner's benefit. We analyze the optimal claiming sequence for both spouses to maximize your combined lifetime income.

Up to 50% Timing Matters

Survivor Benefits

When a spouse passes, the surviving spouse receives the higher of the two benefits. We plan for this to protect the surviving spouse's income.

Income Protection Legacy Planning

Our Optimization Process

1

Gather Statements

Collect Social Security statements and review your earnings history for accuracy.

2

Run Scenarios

Model multiple claiming strategies and compare lifetime benefit projections.

3

Integrate with Plan

Coordinate the optimal claiming strategy with your overall retirement income plan.

4

Execute Strategy

Implement your claiming strategy at the right time with proper documentation.

Maximize Your Social Security Benefits

The right claiming strategy could mean tens of thousands more in lifetime benefits.

Get Your SS Analysis Call 801.210.2800

Initial consultations are complimentary for qualified families.
